meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for unique — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.antipattern: TransferHelper.safeTransferFrom(token1, source, address(pool), amount1Owed);

cards.title: Compiler-Level Vulnerability Patterns
cards.detect: The Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15, 0.2.16, and 0.3.0 had a bug in the code generation for the `@nonreentrant` decorator.
check: VERIFY: Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15, 0.2.16, and 0.3.0 had a bug in the code generation for the @nonreentrant decorator.
PROVE: Attacker calls remove_liquidity() on the Curve pool (compiled with vulnerable Vyper); Pool sends ETH to the attacker before updating state (standard ETH transfer)
cards.validWhen: The Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15, 0.2.16, and 0.3.0 had a bug in the code generation for the @nonreentrant decorator.

cards.title: 1. Transient Storage (EIP-1153) Authorization Bypass via CREATE2
cards.detect: EIP-1153 introduced `tstore`/`tload` opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
check: VERIFY: EIP-1153 introduced tstore/tload opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
PROVE: Create fake ERC20 tokens (AttackerC_A, AttackerC_B) with malicious mint() that returns uint160(address(this)); Create a fake Uniswap V3 pool using these tokens
ANTIPATTERN: Transient storage used for callback authorization
cards.antipattern: Transient storage used for callback authorization
cards.validWhen: EIP-1153 introduced tstore/tload opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.

check: VERIFY: When a token's _transfer() function applies fees based on a percentage list where sum(shares) > 100%, the sender is debited more tokens than the...
PROVE: Flash loan USDT; Buy the buggy token from the pair (large amount)
ANTIPATTERN: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages
cards.antipattern: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages
cards.validWhen: When a token's _transfer() function applies fees based on a percentage list where sum(shares) > 100%, the sender is debited more tokens than the recipient receives.

cards.title: 5. Bonding Curve Arithmetic Overflow in Price Calculation
cards.detect: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.
check: VERIFY: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.
PROVE: Read bonding curve parameters: reserve, THETA, totalSupply; Solve: $\text{amount} = \sqrt{\frac{\text{type(uint256).max}}{100 \times \text{reserve}} +...
ANTIPATTERN: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts
cards.antipattern: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts
cards.validWhen: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.

cards.title: Economic Arbitrage Design Flaws
cards.detect: Arbitrary Swap Routing via Vault Deposits**: Vault deposit functions accept user-controlled swap routing data (e.
check: VERIFY: Arbitrary Swap Routing via Vault Deposits: Vault deposit functions accept user-controlled swap routing data (e.
PROVE: *Thin Pool Vault Routing (UsualMoney pattern); Create a Uniswap V3 pool (USD0/sUSDS) with minimal liquidity (~10 sUSDS)
FALSIFY: Only allow routing through whitelisted pools
IMPACT: Controlled Price Impact: Attackers create pools with minimal liquidity specifically for exploitation
cards.antipattern: VaultRouter.deposit() accepts arbitrary swap routing data
cards.securePattern: Only allow routing through whitelisted pools
cards.validWhen: Arbitrary Swap Routing via Vault Deposits: Vault deposit functions accept user-controlled swap routing data (e.
cards.invalidWhen: Only allow routing through whitelisted pools
cards.impact: Controlled Price Impact: Attackers create pools with minimal liquidity specifically for exploitation

cards.title: Fee Mechanism Exploitation Patterns
cards.detect: Zero Quantity Fee Bypass**: Functions that calculate `totalPrice = quantity * pricePerItem` without requiring `quantity > 0`.
check: VERIFY: Zero Quantity Fee Bypass: Functions that calculate totalPrice = quantity * pricePerItem without requiring quantity > 0.
PROVE: *Zero Quantity Attack (TreasureDAO pattern); Attacker calls buyItem(tokenId, owner, quantity=0, pricePerItem, ...)
FALSIFY: Measure actual balance change, not transfer amount
IMPACT: Free Asset Acquisition: Zero-quantity bypass allows acquiring assets for $0
cards.antipattern: Token has broken fee mechanism creating phantom balance
cards.securePattern: Measure actual balance change, not transfer amount
cards.validWhen: Zero Quantity Fee Bypass: Functions that calculate totalPrice = quantity * pricePerItem without requiring quantity > 0.
cards.invalidWhen: Measure actual balance change, not transfer amount
cards.impact: Free Asset Acquisition: Zero-quantity bypass allows acquiring assets for $0

cards.title: Liquidity Migration Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: The root causes fall into three distinct patterns:
check: VERIFY: root causes fall into three distinct patterns
PROVE: *Fake Token Injection (Team Finance pattern); Call migrate(realPair, fakeToken0, fakeToken1) — pair is burned, real tokens go to migrator
FALSIFY: Use time-weighted average price instead of spot for migration
IMPACT: Token Stranding: Real tokens stranded in migrator contracts when fake tokens are used
cards.antipattern: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
cards.securePattern: Use time-weighted average price instead of spot for migration
cards.validWhen: The root causes fall into three distinct patterns
cards.invalidWhen: Use time-weighted average price instead of spot for migration
cards.impact: Token Stranding: Real tokens stranded in migrator contracts when fake tokens are used

cards.title: msg.value in Loop Vulnerability
cards.detect: Solidity's `msg.value` is immutable for the duration of a transaction call.
check: VERIFY: Solidity's msg.value is immutable for the duration of a transaction call.
PROVE: *Opyn Protocol Pattern; Attacker calls exercise(vaultIds, amountsToExercise) with an array of 2+ vaults
FALSIFY: Only allow msg.value in first sub-call, or don't use delegatecall for payable
IMPACT: Payment Bypass: Attackers pay once but execute multiple paid operations
cards.antipattern: SushiMiso DutchAuction batch() forwards msg.value to each sub-call
cards.securePattern: Only allow msg.value in first sub-call, or don't use delegatecall for payable
cards.validWhen: Solidity's msg.value is immutable for the duration of a transaction call.
cards.invalidWhen: Only allow msg.value in first sub-call, or don't use delegatecall for payable
cards.impact: Payment Bypass: Attackers pay once but execute multiple paid operations

cards.title: NFT-Specific Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: Missing Buyer Validation in fillSellOrder()**: The marketplace's `fillSellOrder()` function validates only the seller's...
check: VERIFY: Missing Buyer Validation in fillSellOrder(): The marketplace's fillSellOrder() function validates only the seller's...
PROVE: *Forced Sale Attack (Quixotic pattern); Attacker monitors marketplace for valuable NFT listings
FALSIFY: Buyer must be msg.sender or provide a signature
IMPACT: Forced NFT Sales: Attacker fills any active listing without proper authorization
cards.antipattern: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
cards.securePattern: Buyer must be msg.sender or provide a signature
cards.validWhen: Missing Buyer Validation in fillSellOrder(): The marketplace's fillSellOrder() function validates only the seller's...
cards.invalidWhen: Buyer must be msg.sender or provide a signature
cards.impact: Forced NFT Sales: Attacker fills any active listing without proper authorization

cards.title: Skim Token Balance Attack Patterns
cards.detect: The root causes fall into two distinct patterns:
check: VERIFY: root causes fall into two distinct patterns
PROVE: *Skim Loop with Deflationary Token (GSS/ANCH pattern); Flash loan stablecoin (USDT/BUSD) from DODO
FALSIFY: Track actual received amounts, don't rely on skim()
IMPACT: Reserve Manipulation: Pair reserves diverge from actual token balances
cards.antipattern: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
cards.securePattern: Track actual received amounts, don't rely on skim()
cards.validWhen: The root causes fall into two distinct patterns
cards.invalidWhen: Track actual received amounts, don't rely on skim()
cards.impact: Reserve Manipulation: Pair reserves diverge from actual token balances

cards.title: Stale/Cached State Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: Stale Global Variable Accumulation**: A storage variable updated during sells (`sellAmount`) is used in the sell logic...
check: VERIFY: Stale Global Variable Accumulation: A storage variable updated during sells (sellAmount) is used in the sell logic...
PROVE: *Stale Variable Accumulation (CS Token pattern); Attacker makes 99 tiny buy transactions — each inflates the sellAmount global variable
FALSIFY: Track sell amounts per address instead of globally
IMPACT: State Accumulation Exploit: Global variables that accumulate across transactions create exploitation windows
cards.antipattern: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
cards.securePattern: Track sell amounts per address instead of globally
cards.validWhen: Stale Global Variable Accumulation: A storage variable updated during sells (sellAmount) is used in the sell logic...
cards.invalidWhen: Track sell amounts per address instead of globally
cards.impact: State Accumulation Exploit: Global variables that accumulate across transactions create exploitation windows

cards.title: Swap Metapool Attack Patterns
cards.detect: Virtual Price Dependency**: Metapools price their LP token component using the base pool's `virtual_price()`.
check: VERIFY: Virtual Price Dependency: Metapools price their LP token component using the base pool's virtual_price().
PROVE: *Cross-Pool Arbitrage (Saddle pattern); Flash loan large amount of stablecoin (USDC)
FALSIFY: Verify metapool's virtual price against base pool before swap
IMPACT: Cross-Pool Arbitrage: Price discrepancies between interconnected pools allow risk-free extraction
cards.antipattern: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
cards.securePattern: Verify metapool's virtual price against base pool before swap
cards.validWhen: Virtual Price Dependency: Metapools price their LP token component using the base pool's virtual_price().
cards.invalidWhen: Verify metapool's virtual price against base pool before swap
cards.impact: Cross-Pool Arbitrage: Price discrepancies between interconnected pools allow risk-free extraction

cards.title: ConvertToShares Manipulation: Blocking Deposits via Direct Token Transfers
cards.detect: ERC4626 vaults typically calculate total assets using:
check: VERIFY: ERC4626 vaults typically calculate total assets using
PROVE: balanceOf can be manipulated by direct transfers
FALSIFY: Permanent dead shares prevent empty vault manipulation
IMPACT: Zero Share Minting: Deposits return 0 shares, users lose funds
LOOK FOR: _totalAssets() using asset.balanceOf(address(this))
cards.antipattern: balanceOf can be manipulated by direct transfers
cards.securePattern: Permanent dead shares prevent empty vault manipulation
cards.validWhen: ERC4626 vaults typically calculate total assets using
cards.invalidWhen: Permanent dead shares prevent empty vault manipulation
cards.impact: Zero Share Minting: Deposits return 0 shares, users lose funds

cards.title: Cross-Contract Reentrancy Allows YIELD_TOKEN Theft in Multi-Vault ERC4626 Systems
cards.detect: The `WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens()` function captures the initial `YIELD_TOKEN` balance **before** executing a...
check: VERIFY: WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens() function captures the initial YIELD_TOKEN balance before executing a potentially reentrant trade operation...
PROVE: *Prerequisites; WithdrawalRequestManager manages multiple vault strategies
FALSIFY: Balance snapshot after all external calls
IMPACT: Inflated Share Minting: Attacker receives more vault shares than their deposit value
LOOK FOR: Balance snapshot before external calls: balanceOf() ... externalCall() ... balanceOf()
cards.antipattern: Only validates first and last tokens, not middle path
cards.securePattern: Balance snapshot after all external calls
cards.validWhen: The WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens() function captures the initial YIELD_TOKEN balance before executing a potentially reentrant trade operation (_preStakingTrade).
cards.invalidWhen: Balance snapshot after all external calls
cards.impact: Inflated Share Minting: Attacker receives more vault shares than their deposit value

cards.title: Flash Loan Vault Deflation Attack: Draining Accumulated Yield via Share Price Reset
cards.detect: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using:
check: VERIFY: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using
PROVE: *Prerequisites; ERC4626 IBT vault with accumulated yield (share price > 1)
FALSIFY: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
IMPACT: Share Price Reset: Vault's share price forcibly returned to default value
Does the protocol offer flash loans of ERC4626 shares?
Can the flash loan drain the entire underlying vault?
cards.antipattern: Allows borrowing entire IBT supply without rate protection
cards.securePattern: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
cards.validWhen: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using
cards.invalidWhen: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
cards.impact: Share Price Reset: Vault's share price forcibly returned to default value
